message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "참가자" as Participant
participant "깃헙 리포지토리" as GitHubRepo
participant "깃헙 액션" as GitHubAction
actor "운영자" as Operator
participant "파워 오토메이트" as PowerAutomate
database "데이터베이스" as Database

rectangle "PR" {
    note right of Participant: GHA 챌린지 완료 인증샷
    Participant -> GitHubRepo: PR 생성
    activate GitHubRepo
    GitHubRepo -> GitHubAction: 이벤트 생성
    activate GitHubAction
    GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 추가: review-required
    deactivate GitHubAction
    deactivate GitHubRepo
}

rectangle "REVIEW" {
    Operator -> Operator: 리뷰
    activate Operator
    Operator -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 추가: review-completed
    Operator -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 삭제: review-required
    Operator -> GitHubRepo: 코멘트: /ghasignoff
    GitHubRepo -> GitHubAction: 이벤트 생성
    activate GitHubAction
    
    note left of GitHubAction: 지정된 사용자만\n이벤트 생성 가능
    
    GitHubAction -> PowerAutomate: 호출
    activate PowerAutomate
    
    note right of GitHubAction: GitHub ID\nPR 본문\n제출시간
    
    PowerAutomate -> Database: 레코드 조회
    activate Database
    Database --> PowerAutomate: GitHub ID
    deactivate Database
    
    alt [레코드 있음]
        PowerAutomate -> Database: 레코드 업데이트
        Database --> PowerAutomate: PR ID
        PowerAutomate -> GitHubAction: 호출
        deactivate PowerAutomate
        
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 추가: record-updated
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 추가: completed-gha
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 삭제: review-completed
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: PR 머지
        deactivate GitHubAction
        
        note right of PowerAutomate: 업데이트 완료
        PowerAutomate -> Participant: 확인 이메일
    else [레코드 없음]
        PowerAutomate -> GitHubAction: 호출
        deactivate PowerAutomate
        
        note right of PowerAutomate: PR ID
        note right of PowerAutomate: 레코드 없음
        
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 추가: review-required
        GitHubAction -> GitHubRepo: 라벨 삭제: review-completed
        deactivate GitHubAction
        
        PowerAutomate -> Participant: 확인 이메일
    end
    deactivate Operator
}

@enduml
```
